12#include <stddef.h>
13#include <stdint.h>
14
15#define MAX_PATH_LEN 512
16#define MAX_PAIRS 128
17
18typedef struct
19{
20 float re;
21 float im;
22} complexf_t;
23
24typedef struct
25{
26 char data_path[MAX_PATH_LEN];
27 char meta_path[MAX_PATH_LEN];
28} sigmf_pair_t;
29
30typedef struct
31{
32 uint32_t sample_rate;
33 uint64_t center_freq;
34} sigmf_meta_t;
35
36typedef struct
37{
38 float noise_floor_dbm;
39 float center_power_dbm;
40 float snr_center_db;
41} iq_metrics_t;
42
43typedef struct
44{
45 double load_ms;
46 double convert_ms;
47 double preprocess_ms;
48 double welch_ms;
49 double metric_ms;
50 double kde_ms;
51 double total_ms;
52} perf_timing_t;
53
54typedef struct
55{
56 size_t alloc_count;
57 size_t free_count;
58 size_t bytes_current;
59 size_t bytes_peak;
60} mem_tracker_t;
61
65typedef struct
66{
67 size_t nperseg;
68 size_t step;
69 float overlap;
70 float window_power;
71 float inv_norm;
72 float *window;
73 complexf_t *fft_buf;
74 size_t *bitrev;
75 float *psd_acc;
76 float *freq_hz;
77 float *psd_shifted;
78 uint32_t cached_fs;
79 int freq_ready;
80} welch_workspace_t;

87double process_rss_mb(void);
89double process_peak_rss_mb(void);
91double system_ram_percent(void);
